description: Operational view for client -> proxy -> upstream flow. Uses route and operation scopes. Current metrics cover frontend/upstream RED, peer-cache health, query-range internals, and broad proxy work signals. Exact per-tier cache exchange volume and exact proxy translation latency still require new instrumentation.

targets.expr: topk(12, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (system, route, le) (rate(loki_vl_proxy_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"${job:regex}",cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",env=~"${env:regex}",namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",service=~"${service:regex}",pod=~"${pod:regex}",endpoint=~"${request_type:regex}",route=~"${route:regex}",system=~"${upstream_system:regex}",direction="upstream"}[5m])) ) )

panels.title: Estimated Proxy Non-Upstream Time / Request

targets.expr: topk(12, clamp_min( ( sum by (route) (rate(loki_vl_proxy_request_duration_seconds_sum{job=~"${job:regex}",cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",env=~"${env:regex}",namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",service=~"${service:regex}",pod=~"${pod:regex}",endpoint=~"${request_type:regex}",route=~"${route:regex}",direction="downstream"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (route) (rate(loki_vl_proxy_request_duration_seconds_count{job=~"${job:regex}",cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",env=~"${env:regex}",namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",service=~"${service:regex}",pod=~"${pod:regex}",endpoint=~"${request_type:regex}",route=~"${route:regex}",direction="downstream"}[5m])), 0.001) ) - ( sum by (route) (rate(loki_vl_proxy_request_duration_seconds_sum{job=~"${job:regex}",cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",env=~"${env:regex}",namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",service=~"${service:regex}",pod=~"${pod:regex}",endpoint=~"${request_type:regex}",route=~"${route:regex}",system=~"${upstream_system:regex}",direction="upstream"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (route) (rate(loki_vl_proxy_requests_total{job=~"${job:regex}",cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",env=~"${env:regex}",namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",service=~"${service:regex}",pod=~"${pod:regex}",endpoint=~"${request_type:regex}",route=~"${route:regex}",direction="downstream"}[5m])), 0.001) ), 0 ) * 1000 )

panels.description: Approximate non-upstream wall time per request. Multi-backend routes can overstate or understate this value.

targets.expr: topk(12, 100 * sum by (route) (rate(loki_vl_proxy_cache_hits_by_endpoint{job=~"${job:regex}",cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",env=~"${env:regex}",namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",service=~"${service:regex}",pod=~"${pod:regex}",endpoint=~"${request_type:regex}",route=~"${route:regex}"}[5m])) / clamp_min( sum by (route) (rate(loki_vl_proxy_cache_hits_by_endpoint{job=~"${job:regex}",cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",env=~"${env:regex}",namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",service=~"${service:regex}",pod=~"${pod:regex}",endpoint=~"${request_type:regex}",route=~"${route:regex}"}[5m])) + sum by (route) (rate(loki_vl_proxy_cache_misses_by_endpoint{job=~"${job:regex}",cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",env=~"${env:regex}",namespace=~"${namespace:regex}",service=~"${service:regex}",pod=~"${pod:regex}",endpoint=~"${request_type:regex}",route=~"${route:regex}"}[5m])), 0.001 ) )

panels.title: Cache Hits vs Misses by Route
Top Routes by Cache Miss Rate
Memory Saturation
panels.description: Memory pressure view for the selected proxy scope. Usage is node memory consumption on the host namespace; PSI shows sustained reclaim and stall pressure.

panels.title: CPU Saturation by Mode
panels.description: CPU share consumed by the selected proxy scope. Uses the actual mode label exported by the process CPU ratio family.

panels.title: Disk IOPS Up / Down
panels.description: Process IO operation rate from /proc/self/io. Read is positive, write is negative for the same directional visual language as network.

panels.title: Network Up / Down
panels.description: Network throughput in a directional view. Receive stays above zero, transmit stays below zero.

panels.title: Memory Footprint and Headroom
panels.description: Process footprint against the tightest node memory headroom in the selected scope.

panels.title: Disk Throughput Up / Down
panels.description: Disk byte throughput in the same directional shape as network and IOPS.

panels.title: PSI Pressure (60s)
panels.description: Sustained stall pressure over the 60s PSI window.

title: Loki-VL-proxy Operations
